title: Citizens Financial Group 2025 Form 10-K
note: Latest annual filing used for business profile, segment structure, total assets, deposits, revenue, net income, and balance-sheet context.

title: Citizens Financial Group Market Capitalization
note: Market capitalization and share-price snapshot used for marketCap input.

title: Citizens Financial Group P/E Ratio
note: Trailing P/E ratio snapshot used for valuation input.

title: Citizens Checking Accounts
note: Official product page for Citizens checking accounts, fees, features, and online account-opening paths.

title: Citizens Savings Accounts
note: Official Citizens savings page used as context for consumer deposit features and FDIC-insured savings positioning.

title: Citizens Access
note: Official homepage for Citizens' online deposit brand referenced by the intake manifest.

title: Apache Fineract
note: Open-source core banking platform used as an alternative and enabler for cooperative checking and digital deposit concepts.

title: GNU Taler
publisher: GNUnet e.V. and Taler Systems SA
note: Free-software payment system used as an enabler for privacy-preserving open payment rails.

title: Fedimint
note: Open-source federated Bitcoin e-cash project used as an alternative and enabler for community custody and Lightning-connected payments.

title: Fedimint Technical Reference Documentation
note: Technical documentation for Fedimint modules, federation architecture, e-cash, wallet, Lightning integration, and threshold cryptography.
